meta.name: Magneta — Set PromotionPayment prices to match UI (polygon)
meta.description: Calibrate priceByCode on PromotionPayment (0x2FaC13e2707475E6Ea034b92Ffc855333668c4Ea) to match PROMOTION_FEES[POLYGON] in the Tokens frontend: 1h=200, 2h=400, 3h=600, 4h=800, 5h=1000, 6h=1200 POL. Without this batch the contract floor stays at deploy-script defaults (0.1, 0.2, 0.3, 0.6, n/a, n/a, 1.2, 2.4) which is way below the UI-displayed prices — anyone calling the contract directly would underpay.
